sourceAmbiguity: Support recovery, stale-link recovery, and rebind could each invent a different shell.
decisionTaken: Use one claim-resume route family and shared component anatomy for every recovery posture.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Same-shell morphs keep patient context visible without detached recovery pages.
operationalRisk: Support workspace work may later need deeper context handoff.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add a support handoff contract while keeping this patient shell as the origin.
